hero.subtitleAfter: . Built for collective intelligence — no manipulation, no ads, no addiction.

features.subtitle: Every feature was shaped through the Triple Bottom Line lens: People, Planet, Profit.

featureItems.title: Academic peer support
featureItems.desc: Ask questions, share resources, and progress together. The SupMTI community at your fingertips.

featureItems.title: Ethical & secure
featureItems.desc: Privacy by design, HTTPS encryption, and the right to be forgotten. Your data stays yours.

featureItems.title: Collective intelligence
featureItems.desc: No addictive algorithm. A feed ranked by academic relevance, not maximum engagement.

featureItems.title: Eco-designed
featureItems.desc: Optimized for weak connections and older devices. Technology that serves everyone.

featureItems.title: Right to disconnect
featureItems.desc: Focus mode and automatic notification quiet hours after class. Your sleep matters.

featureItems.title: Exclusive access
featureItems.desc: Reserved for SupMTI students via institutional email. A trusted community.

ethics.sectionBadge: The DNA of the PIDR project
ethics.title: The 3
ethics.subtitle: UniConnect is not just an app. It shows engineering can be human.

steps.title: Scoping
steps.desc: Identifying the real peer-support need at SupMTI through student interviews.

steps.title: Research
steps.desc: Literature review (IEEE & Google Scholar) on social learning and ethical tech.

steps.title: Feasibility
steps.desc: Server cost analysis, ethical risks, and GDPR / Moroccan legal framework.

steps.title: Prototyping
steps.desc: MVP with React (front), Laravel (back), SQL Server (DB).

steps.title: Testing
steps.desc: User testing with a panel of SupMTI students and faculty.

steps.title: Defense
steps.desc: Final PIDR report and presentation to the academic jury.

items.name: Yasmine B.
items.text: The interface is incredibly smooth. I found a project partner for my Oracle assignment in minutes thanks to relevance-based feed.

items.name: Omar E.
items.text: Focus mode changed how I revise. Knowing notifications stop to protect my sleep makes a real difference.

items.name: Salma R.
items.text: Finally a safe space without ad bombardment. Transparency on how our data is used really reassures me.

items.name: Mehdi A.
items.text: The resources section is gold. I found routing algorithm traces that saved my exams.

items.name: Anas K.
items.text: Algorithmic justice is a great concept. You feel the platform is built for wellbeing, not addiction.

items.name: Houda T.
items.text: SupMTI email signup means a trustworthy community. Clean, efficient, and genuinely useful daily.

cta.title: Ready to join
cta.subtitle: Sign up with your institutional email and start learning together, today.
cta.footerLine: No data sold · Zero ads · Right to be forgotten guaranteed
